name: bitbucket
description: Bitbucket Cloud PR-review channel — watch an agent's open PRs, queue review work on unanswered feedback / changes-requested

tools.name: bitbucket_get_pr
tools.description: Read a pull request (description, state, branches)

tools.name: bitbucket_get_pr_activity
tools.description: Read a pull request's activity/review history

tools.name: bitbucket_add_comment
tools.description: Reply to a PR (general or inline file:line)

tools.name: bitbucket_set_review
tools.description: Set the review decision (approve / request changes / none)

tools.name: bitbucket_create_pr
tools.description: Open a new pull request (allow-list gated)
